StmtSimple.StatementText:
WITH BasePrincipals AS (SELECT p.Id AS PrincipalId, u.[Name], u.LoginName, u.Email, u.MobileNo, ISNULL(A.LastLogin, U.LastLogin) AS LastLogin, P.CreatedTime FROM [dbo].[User] U LEFT JOIN [dbo].[UserM2M] M ON U.PrincipalId = M.PrincipalId INNER JOIN [dbo].[Principal] P ON U.PrincipalId = P.Id OUTER APPLY (SELECT TOP 1 LastLogin FROM [dbo].[PrincipalAuthLog] WHERE U.PrincipalId = PrincipalId ORDER BY LastLogin DESC) A WHERE M.PrincipalId IS NULL AND p.DeletedTime IS NULL)
, AllPrincipals AS (SELECT PrincipalId AS Id,PrincipalId AS PId, [Name], LoginName, Email, MobileNo, LastLogin, CreatedTime FROM BasePrincipals UNION ALL SELECT child.UserGroupPrincipalId AS Id, parent.PId AS PId, parent.[Name], parent.LoginName, parent.Email, parent.MobileNo, parent.LastLogin, parent.CreatedTime FROM [dbo].[PrincipalUserGroup] child INNER JOIN [dbo].[Principal] PG ON child.UserGroupPrincipalId = PG.Id AND PG.DeletedTime IS NULL INNER JOIN AllPrincipals parent ON child.PrincipalId = parent.Id WHERE child.DeletedBy IS NULL) , Admittance AS (SELECT PG.PrincipalId AS PId,ARes.AggregatedResourceId AS AdmittanceUser FROM [dbo].[Privilege] AP INNER JOIN [dbo].[Resource] ARes ON AP.ResourceId = ARes.Id INNER JOIN [dbo].[PrincipalUserGroup] PG ON AP.PrincipalId = PG.UserGroupPrincipalId AND PG.DeletedTime IS NULL INNER JOIN [dbo].[User] U ON U.PrincipalId = PG.PrincipalId AND U.IsDeleted = 0 WHERE AP.DeletedTime IS NULL AND ARes.AggregatedResourceId = 'Admittance.SuperUser' UNION ALL SELECT P.Id AS PId, ARes.AggregatedResourceId AS AdmittanceUser FROM [dbo].[Privilege] AP INNER JOIN [dbo].[Resource] ARes ON AP.ResourceId = ARes.Id INNER JOIN [dbo].[Principal] p ON AP.PrincipalId = P.Id AND P.DeletedTime IS NULL INNER JOIN [dbo].[User] U ON U.PrincipalId = P.Id WHERE AP.DeletedTime IS NULL AND ARes.AggregatedResourceId = 'Admittance.SuperUser' ) SELECT DISTINCT AllPrincipals.PId AS PrincipalId, AllPrincipals.[Name], AllPrincipals.LoginName, AllPrincipals.Email, AllPrincipals.MobileNo, AllPrincipals.LastLogin, AllPrincipals.CreatedTime, AllPrincipals.Id AS PrivilegePrincipalId, Ro.AggregatedRoleId AS AggregatedRole, Res.AggregatedResourceId AS AggregatedResource, Ro.Id AS RoleId, Res.Id AS ResourceId, Ro.Name AS RoleName, Ro.RoleValue AS RoleValue, Res.Name AS ResourceName, Ro.RoleType As RoleType, SR.SecondaryRoleID, SR.SecondaryRoleName, SR.SecondaryRole, SR.SecondaryRoleValue, (CASE WHEN UAD.PrincipalId IS NULL THEN 'S' ELSE 'A' END) AS AccountType, Admittance.AdmittanceUser FROM AllPrincipals LEFT JOIN [dbo].[UserActiveDirectory] UAD ON AllPrincipals.PId = UAD.PrincipalId INNER JOIN [dbo].[Privilege] P ON AllPrincipals.Id = P.PrincipalId AND P.DeletedTime IS NULL INNER JOIN [dbo].[Role] Ro ON P.RoleId = Ro.Id INNER JOIN (SELECT Child.Id AS SubId, Parent.Id AS SecondaryRoleID, Parent.Name AS SecondaryRoleName, Parent.AggregatedRoleId AS SecondaryRole, Parent.RoleValue AS SecondaryRoleValue, Parent.RoleType AS SecondaryRoleType FROM [dbo].[Role] AS Parent INNER JOIN [dbo].[Role] AS Child ON Parent.ID = Child.ParentRoleId AND Parent.RoleType = 'K') SR ON Ro.Id = SR.SubId INNER JOIN [dbo].[Resource] Res ON P.ResourceId = Res.Id LEFT JOIN Admittance ON AllPrincipals.PId = Admittance.PId WHERE P.DeletedTime IS NULL AND AllPrincipals.PId = @principalId ORDER BY AllPrincipals.PId

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: CASE WHEN [T-INF-Admittance].[dbo].[UserActiveDirectory].[PrincipalId] as [UAD].[PrincipalId] IS NULL THEN 'S' ELSE 'A' END
CASE WHEN [Expr1047]>(100) THEN (0) ELSE NULL END
